description_long: This is a square white ceramic plate featuring a fresh green salad with sliced chicken breast and cherry tomatoes, topped with a creamy dressing. The plate is accompanied by a smaller square plate holding a round, golden-brown bread roll or pastry. Nearby, there is a dark glass wine bottle with a black label and gold accents, adding a touch of elegance to the setting. The plates have a glossy, smooth finish and are set on a flat surface, likely for dining. The arrangement suggests a meal presentation, suitable for a restaurant or upscale urban dining environment. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and inviting, with a focus on the plated food.
description: A modern square white plate with a fresh salad and chicken, accompanied by a bread roll on a smaller plate and a dark wine bottle. The setting is clean, elegant, and suitable for urban dining.
description_view_0: Front view shows the salad plate in the foreground, bread roll behind, and wine bottle to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the salad plate and bread roll side by side, with the wine bottle's label visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the wine bottle in the foreground, salad plate behind, and bread roll to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with the wine bottle and bread roll in front, salad plate behind.
attribute_surrounding_context: The plates and wine bottle are placed on a flat surface, likely a table, with food items arranged for a meal.
